title: viola lutea subsp. trinitatis
intro: Viola lutea subsp. trinitatis, also known as the Trinitatis Yellow Violet or Lesser Yellow Violet, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the violet family (Violaceae). This perennial plant is native to the Caribbean, specifically Trinidad and Tobago, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Viola lutea subsp. trinitatis include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
